box_shape.description: optional box type [FLY=Flyer/Smalls - pieces that are too small, thin or light to be sorted on a standard conveyor, or for which it makes sense to group pieces into larger units for sort purposes. COY=Parcels/Conveyables - pieces that can be handled onto a system, less than 31.5 kg and up to 60*60*120cm. NCY=Non-conveyables - Pieces that cannot on their own be sorted on standard conveyor. PAL=Pallets - large, irregular or heavy pieces, Palletized with weight upto 1000 KG. DBL=Double Pallets - large, irregular or heavy pieces, Palletized with weight upto 1000 KG. BOX=Parcels that are conveyable have the shape of a box. Up to 70kg.]

declared_value.description: Package Level Declared Value for Dutiable International Shipments

box_shape.description: optional box type [FLY=Flyer/Smalls - pieces that are too small, thin or light to be sorted on a standard conveyor, or for which it makes sense to group pieces into larger units for sort purposes. COY=Parcels/Conveyables - pieces that can be handled onto a system, less than 31.5 kg and up to 60*60*120cm. NCY=Non-conveyables - Pieces that cannot on their own be sorted on standard conveyor. PAL=Pallets - large, irregular or heavy pieces, Palletized with weight upto 1000 KG. DBL=Double Pallets - large, irregular or heavy pieces, Palletized with weight upto 1000 KG. BOX=Parcels that are conveyable have the shape of a box. Up to 70kg.]

packing_list_id.description: id for packing list for profile template associated with this label

reason_for_export.description: [P - Permanent, T - Temporary, R - Re-Export] It is required for dutiable shipment.

declared_value.description: Shipment Level Declared Value for Dutiable International Shipments

pickup.description: pickup date time to schedule for the carrier

signature_service.description: signature service option. Signature services are included in international shipments. Use `SX` for no signature required

nonstandard_day.description: options are [AA - Saturday Delivery, AB - Saturday Pickup, AC - Holiday Delivery, AD - Holiday Pickup, AG - Domestic Saturday Delivery]

nonstandard_contents.description: options are [HB - Lithium Ion PI965 Section II, HC - Dry Ice UN1845, HD - Lithium Ion PI965-966 Section II, HE - Dangerous Goods, HG - Perishable Cargo, HH - Excepted Quantity, HI - Spill Cleaning, HK - Consumer Commodities, HL - Limited Quantities ADR, HM - Lithium Metal PI969 Section II, HN - ADR Load Exemption, HV - Lithium Ion PI967-Section II, HW - Lithium Metal PI970-Section II, HY - Biological UN3373]

federal_tax_id.description: Mandatory for domestic shipment of country code = BR

state_tax_id.description: Mandatory for domestic shipment of country code = BR

duty_payment_type.description: Duties may be paid via Shipper [S], Recipient [R], or Third Party [T]

ship_from.description: The ship_from address is used as the originating address of the rate and label request.

ship_to.description: The to address is used as the destination address of a return order rate and label request.

warehouse_id.description: Currently ignored. Previously used for updating a warehouse for the ship_from address on an order.

shipping_payment_type.description: Shipping may be paid via Shipper [S], Recipient [R], or Third Party [T]

internal_transaction_number.description: Internal transaction number provided by the US Customs AES System
